title: tiliacora leonensis
intro: Tiliacora leonensis, a plant species native to West Africa, is a perennial herb belonging to the Menispermaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic activities. The health benefits of Tiliacora leonensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and intestinal parasites, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used in traditional African medicine.
